text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher iraisonablem Preiß zu haben seyen: <BIBL><TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR> & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR><TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"1. Replaced Unicode escape sequences (\\u221a\\00b4, \\u221a\\00fc, \\u221a\\2264) with their proper characters (ß, ü, 4to/8vo). 2. Escaped ampersands (&) to & for XML compliance. 3. Fixed missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Mohemii entry. 4. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Ovidii entry. 5. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Herodianus entry. 6. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Elianus entry. 7. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Schrevelii entry. 8. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Nisselii entry. 9. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Buxtorfii entry. 10. Standardized format tags (4t\u001a\u0014 to 4to, 8v\u001a\u0014 to 8vo)."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher iraisonablem Preiß zu haben seyen: <BIBL><TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR> & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR><TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR><TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Replaced Unicode escape sequences (\u221a\00b4, \u221a\00fc, \u221a\2264) with their proper characters (ß, ü, 4to/8vo). 2. Escaped ampersands (&) to & for XML compliance. 3. Fixed missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Mohemii entry. 4. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Ovidii entry. 5. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Herodianus entry. 6. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Elianus entry. 7. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Schrevelii entry. 8. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Nisselii entry. 9. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the Buxtorfii entry. 10. Standardized format tags (4t to 4to, 8v to 8vo).
